name: Artichoke Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wooden salad bowl, mash the garlic with a fork.
2. Add salt and stir.
3. Add fresh artichoke hearts and continue to mash.
4. Add olive oil, lemon juice, wine vinegar, hot sauce, and Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
6. Place canned artichoke hearts in the dressing.
7. Let marinate for 1 hour.
8. Serve as is or on a bed of greens.
